name: h-rails
description: H Rails — Agent Payments Protocol market intelligence platform on X Layer

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @h-rails/api" "npm run dev -w @h-rails/web"
scripts.deploy:gateway: cd contracts && set -a && [ -f ../.env ] && . ../.env && set +a && forge script script/DeployGatewayKey.s.sol --rpc-url ${XLAYER_RPC_URL:-https://xlayerrpc.okx.com} --broadcast
